description.from: Deals 161(1+0.3Skill Level)+70.7% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 12 times to a random enemy.
description.to: Deals 128*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+80.4% ATK Physical DMG to a random enemy 12 times.

description.from: Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. On attack, consumes 1 arrow to deal 351(1+0.3Skill Level)+154.3% of Attack Power as additional Physical Damage.
description.to: Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal 230*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+144.8% ATK additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

description.from: Deals up to 1530(1+0.3Skill Level)+671% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies in a line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill has an additional 500 Physical Defense Penetration, and if the target is a boss, deals an additional 765(1+0.3Skill Level)+335.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.
description.to: Deals 1198*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+759.8% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down for 3 sec. This damage increases based on the target’s lost HP, up to a maximum of 100%. Additionally, against Bosses, deals 685*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+434.2% ATK additional Physical DMG, and this damage is applied with 500 higher Physical DEF Penetration.

description.from: After using a skill or Normal Attack, increases Attack by 24(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by 100 for 5 sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At maximum stacks, you cannot gain additional [Moonlight Arrow] during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 extra arrows that each deal 143% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.
description.to: After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Crit Chance by 80 for 7sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing 95.3% ATK Physical DMG.

dark.from: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for 0.6 sec.
dark.to: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for 0.5 sec.

light.from: Attack Speed is increased by 8% per stack.
light.to: Attack Speed increases by 5% per stack.

dark.from: At the start of battle, Attack is increased by 10%. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: Damage dealt to bosses increases by 5% per stack.

dark.from: Your Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 300, but Critical Damage is increased by 150%.
dark.to: Your Critical Rate is reduced by 300, but Critical DMG increases by 70%.

description.from: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by {0}% for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. The additional damage can only occur once every 0.5 sec.
description.to: On Crit, increases ATK Spd by {0}% for 10 sec. During the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical DMG to the target. This additional DMG can be triggered once every 0.5 sec.
